parameters.jsCode:
const body = $input.first().json.body;
return [{ json: { groupId: body.groupId || "", message: body.message || "", imageUrl: body.imageUrl || "", imageMimetype: body.imageMimetype || "image/jpeg", mentionAll: body.mentionAll === true || body.mentionAll === "true", scheduledAt: body.scheduledAt || "" } }];
